rationale: The response calibrates the abstract question to the actual decision context: a new graduate choosing between two offers. It gives situated offer-selection criteria around growth density, normalized overtime, compensation, personal goals, health, and manager/team quality, while preserving factual/legal-health layers such as overtime pay, time off, and physical sustainability. It avoids generic moralizing and commits to a usable decision rule: choose the offer with higher growth certainty, reliable manager, rising business, and bounded overtime.
